goal: Promote the anti-false-positive spike into a general AI-TDD contract execution gate for any confirmed implementationConfirmation.
deliverable: A read-only gate CLI that emits ContractExecutionManifest, row-level red/green matrix, missing test plan, acceptance/e2e plan, target artifact plan, negative control plan, closeout readiness report, and sub-gate reports.
constraints: Do not continue expanding pre-rerun-anti-false-positive-gate as the primary implementation.
Keep implementationConfirmation as the authoritative requirements source.
Treat acceptance/e2e tests as first-class manifest entries rather than implicit command text.
Use PowerShell 7 for shell commands and apply_patch for edits.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/ai-tdd-contract-gate.ts supports pre-implementation, pre-rerun, iteration, and closeout modes.
acceptanceTests and e2eSuites are schemaized and recognized by renderer, reverse audit, and contract authoring.
pre-rerun compatibility wrapper delegates to the new gate.
closeout runner enforces the new gate by default for confirmed source-backed records.

Tests cover unconfirmed source, missing acceptance coverage, missing negative controls, controlled red proof, unexpected green, invalid red, partial iteration green, row-level matrix, closeout reverse audit blocking, mock-only, exitCode-only, stale attempt evidence, and wrapper compatibility.
nonGoals: Do not execute arbitrary requirement commands unless an explicit CLI opt-in is provided.
Do not mutate requirement-record.json from the new gate.
Do not mark trace rows closed from the new gate.
Do not make package.json script changes unless required by tests.
completionLanguagePolicy: Report only evidence-backed completion; downgrade completion if any verification fails or is not run.
